Basic hide
Type: Material
Value: 1
Fine Value: 11
Keyword: Hide
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A natural material known for its durability and unique texture.

The Basic hide item is a material.

Uses

Recipe Ingredient

Basic hide is an ingredient in the following recipe:

Item Name Service
Requirement 		Skills Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Make a basic leather Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 5 5x Hide scraps or 1x Basic hide 1x Basic leather

Job Boards

Basic hide can be requested from the following jobs:

Job Board Name Location Quantity Item Type Rewards
Blackspell Port job board Blackspell Port 23 +1  Erdwise Faction Reputation
1x   Hunting chest
Everhaven combined job board Everhaven 23 +1  Erdwise Faction Reputation
1x   Hunting chest

Sources

Activity Drops

Activity Name Skills Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.‡
Bear hunting Hunting lvl. 45 3-4 79.656%† ~1 in 1 125 steps 74 steps
Deer hunting Hunting lvl. 35 2-3 75.000%† ~1 in 1 138 steps 84 steps
Wolf hunting Hunting lvl. 25 2 36.000%† ~1 in 3 368 steps 245 steps

†Note: This activity rolls for loot more than once.
‡W.E.A.R is a value that shows the average steps for one item at maximum work efficiency.

Chest Drops

Chest Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest)† 		Odds
Tailoring chest 2-5 9.186% 31.984% ~1 in 3

†Note: Chests roll for loot multiple times.
